dimensions.label: Task Allocation
dimensions.description: Who owns this step — Human, AI, or shared responsibility?
dimensions.ai_instruction: Suggest whether this step should be owned by a Human, AI, or Both. Provide a 1-sentence rationale grounded in the nature of the task.

dimensions.label: Risk Flagging
dimensions.description: Is this step at risk of over-automation or ethical harm?
dimensions.ai_instruction: Assess whether this step risks over-automation, loss of human accountability, or ethical harm if AI-handled. Rate Low/Medium/High and explain in 1-2 sentences.

dimensions.label: Trust & Explainability
dimensions.description: How important is it that AI decisions here are explainable to users?
dimensions.ai_instruction: Rate the explainability requirement for any AI involvement at this step. Consider: will users or operators need to understand why the AI decided what it did? Rate Low/Medium/High and note if XAI mechanisms (explanations, confidence scores, audit trails) are needed.

dimensions.label: Handoff Points
dimensions.description: Should a human take over from AI at this step? Under what conditions?
dimensions.ai_instruction: Determine if this step requires a human handoff point — a moment where a human must review, approve, or intervene before the process continues. If yes, describe the trigger condition (e.g. 'when confidence is below threshold', 'when emotional content is detected', 'always for high-value decisions').
